{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Zorova
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Zorova]] is a [[Karoshan]] of the [[House Eternal]] with bronze skin and yellow hair.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
